inputs.titre: Siège de Casal (Guerre de Succession de Mantoue)

reason: The image depicts a siege scene with soldiers operating cannons behind a trench. The clothing style (doublets, hats with feathers), cannons, and overall atmosphere are consistent with siege warfare in the 17th century, though the clothing appears slightly generic. There are no visible anachronisms or fantastical elements. The image needs some tweaking to be historically 100% correct.
